MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS ZURICH AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY, AMERICAN GUARANTEE & LIABILITY INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Appearances: Benjamin R. Larson of Selman Breitman (979.0400) for plaintiffs and moving parties; Peter J. Laufenberg of Wendel Rosen Black & Dean (510.834.6600) for the Mission Place defendants; Denis F. Shanagher of Luce Forward (356.4626) for defendant Westchester Surplus Lines Insurance Company. Discussed and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Declaratory Action Or, In The Alternative, Motion For A Protective Order
Off Calendar Sep-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS MISSION PLACE, LLC, MISSION PLACE MEZZANINE, LLC, MISSION PLACE MEZZ HOLDINGS, LLC, MISSION PLACE PARTNERS, LLC, CENTURION REAL ESTATE INVESTORS IV, LLC, CENTURION REAL ESTATE PARTNERS, LLC'S MOTION TO STAY DECLARATORY ACTION OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, MOTION FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER. Appearances: Benjamin R. Larson of Selman Breitman (979.0400) for plaintiffs and responding parties; Peter J. Laufenberg of Wendel Rosen Black & Dean (510.834.6600) for moving parties Mission Place defendants; Denis F. Shanagher of Luce Forward (356.4626) for defendant Westchester Surplus Lines Insurance Company. Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: stay granted as to entire action. Plaintiff granted leave to file the amended complaint before the stay goes into effect. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
